wordplay_note: Echoes J.R. Isidore — the holy fool, the crap artist
card_description: Jack Isidore (meaning "Isidore = gift of Isis") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Confessions of a Crap Artist*. Autodidact and collector of useless facts who narrates his sister's destruction. Name note: Echoes J.R. Isidore — the holy fool, the crap artist. The naif whose clear-eyed observation reveals everyone else's delusions. First appears in *Confessions of a Crap Artist*.

reference.brief: Autodidact and collector of useless facts who narrates his sister's destruction
reference.significance: The naif whose clear-eyed observation reveals everyone else's delusions
